name: @tanstack/expo-db-sqlite-persistence
description: Expo SQLite persisted collection adapter for TanStack DB
author: TanStack Team

scripts.test:e2e: pnpm --filter @tanstack/db-ivm build && pnpm --filter @tanstack/db build && pnpm --filter @tanstack/db-sqlite-persistence-core build && pnpm --filter @tanstack/expo-db-sqlite-persistence build && vitest --config vitest.e2e.config.ts --run
scripts.test:e2e:expo:ios: pnpm --filter @tanstack/db-ivm build && pnpm --filter @tanstack/db build && pnpm --filter @tanstack/db-sqlite-persistence-core build && pnpm --filter @tanstack/expo-db-sqlite-persistence build && TANSTACK_DB_MOBILE_REQUIRE_RUNTIME_FACTORY=1 TANSTACK_DB_MOBILE_SQLITE_FACTORY_MODULE=./tests/helpers/expo-emulator-database-factory.ts TANSTACK_DB_EXPO_RUNTIME_PLATFORM=ios vitest --config vitest.e2e.config.ts --run
scripts.test:e2e:expo:android: pnpm --filter @tanstack/db-ivm build && pnpm --filter @tanstack/db build && pnpm --filter @tanstack/db-sqlite-persistence-core build && pnpm --filter @tanstack/expo-db-sqlite-persistence build && TANSTACK_DB_MOBILE_REQUIRE_RUNTIME_FACTORY=1 TANSTACK_DB_MOBILE_SQLITE_FACTORY_MODULE=./tests/helpers/expo-emulator-database-factory.ts TANSTACK_DB_EXPO_RUNTIME_PLATFORM=android vitest --config vitest.e2e.config.ts --run
